name: Marisol "Roadrunner" Vega

coterie.name: Valley Watch
coterie.description: Desert guide who can cross the wastelands around Phoenix without vehicles; reads sign like scripture.

relationships.name: Tahlia Vance
relationships.notes: Tahlia bankrolls gear; Roadrunner quietly runs perimeter.

description.appearance: Lean, sunburnt Latina in a faded trucker jacket; dust-caked boots; hawk-bright eyes.
description.personality: Quiet, dry wit; patient and pragmatic; a hunter’s stillness until she moves.
description.background: Former long-haul driver on the Vegas–Phoenix route. Embraced at a rest stop by an independent Gangrel.
description.goals: Map the supernatural 'safe trails' around the Valley; keep the coterie alive.
description.mannerisms: Clicks tongue softly when thinking; tastes soil like a tracker.

haven.description: Buried cache, hidden culvert entrance, steel racks for gear.

notes: Knows Garou patrol patterns anecdotally; leaves coterie sigils on mile markers.
